evidence.scientific_clarity: Volcano plot clearly shows up/down/non-sig gene classes with threshold dashed lines; top-5 genes labelled; brief's scientific claim fully delivered.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0 set in script; pdffonts confirms Type 3 (bitmap) fonts (DejaVu Sans family), not editable Type 42/TrueType; default DejaVu Sans used throughout.
evidence.palette: Grey/blue/red palette is colorblind-safe for most forms of CVD; directional color discipline is correct (red=up, blue=down); however red/green convention not violated since green is absent.
evidence.layout_density: 7x5.5 inch figure, tight layout applied, scatter fills the panel well, threshold lines visible, legend in upper-right without overlap; no gaping whitespace.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption lacks concrete n-values for up/down genes (placeholders 'n right/left of threshold'); legend and threshold annotations are present; overall figure is clean but caption incompleteness would draw reviewer comment.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF contains Type 3 bitmap fonts (EVICAO+DejaVuSans-Bold, etc.) — text is not selectable/editable; script does not set matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype']=42.
evidence.file_format: All four required files exist and are non-trivial: figure.pdf (81 KB), figure.png (102 KB), caption.tex (411 B), gen_figure.py (2 KB); bonus figure.svg also present.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption describes axes, thresholds with numeric values, and color coding, but leaves 'n' counts as literal 'n' rather than filling in actual numbers; no specific gene names or p-value claims given.

overall_strengths: Complete, well-structured volcano plot that faithfully implements all brief requirements (thresholds, three-class coloring, top-5 annotation).
Clean layout with tight_layout, spines removed, alpha-blended scatter, and a readable legend — figure is immediately interpretable.
overall_weaknesses: Font type not set to 42/TrueType: PDF uses Type 3 bitmap fonts, making text non-selectable and the figure unsuitable for production-quality journal submission.
Caption leaves actual gene-count placeholders unfilled ('n right/left of threshold') and provides no concrete numerical finding, weakening reviewer-readiness.
